hooks.command: node -e 'const{execSync}=require("child_process");const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));const p=j.tool_input.file_path;try{execSync(`git ls-files --error-unmatch "${p}"`,{stdio:"pipe"})}catch{try{execSync(`git add "${p}"`,{stdio:"pipe"});process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:`새 파일 자동 staged: ${p}`}}))}catch(e){}}'

node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));const c=j.tool_input.command;if(/\bgit\s+(add\s+(-A|\.)(?=\s|$)|commit\s+-a(?=\s|$))/.test(c))process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"git add . / git add -A / git commit -a 금지. 파일을 개별 지정하세요."}}))'

node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));if(/(?:^|&&|\|\||[;|]|\$\(|`)\s*npx\b/.test(j.tool_input.command))process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"npx is not allowed. Use npm scripts instead."}}))'

node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));const c=j.tool_input.command;if(/\bgit\s+commit\s+(-\S+\s+)*(-m|--message)\b/.test(c))process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"bare git commit 금지. staging area race condition 방지를 위해 파일을 직접 지정하세요: git commit <files> -m msg"}}))'

node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));const c=j.tool_input.command;if(/\bgit\s+(commit|push)\b.*--no-verify\b/.test(c))process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"--no-verify 금지. pre-commit hook을 우회하지 마세요."}}))'

node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));const m=j.tool_input.message;if(typeof m==="object"&&m!==null&&m.type==="shutdown_request")process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"팀 에이전트 shutdown 금지. 사용자가 /exit으로 직접 세션을 종료하므로 AI가 shutdown을 보낼 필요가 없습니다."}}))'
